description: Complete the post-visit documentation for Chloe Rafferty (female, DOB: April 18, 2001) at Hillside Family Medicine for an upper respiratory infection. In NOSH, create an 'Office Visit' encounter note dated today. Document her vitals (weight 134 lbs, height 65 inches, blood pressure 112/72, pulse 74 bpm, temperature 99.1 F), add the medical problem 'Acute upper respiratory infection' (ICD-10 J06.9), and record a Penicillin allergy with a 'Hives' reaction. Prescribe Azithromycin 500mg (1 tablet daily for 5 days, quantity 5) and schedule a follow-up with Dr. James Carter on 2026-07-08 at 10:00 AM. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!, practice: Hillside Family Medicine.
